sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 씨게이트 회계 2분기 비GAAP EPS 3.11달러, 마진 기록 경신

keyPoints.text: FY26 2분기 매출이 28억 3,000만 달러로 전년 동기 23억 2,500만 달러에서 늘며 기대치를 웃돌았다.
GAAP 주당순이익 2.60달러, 비GAAP 주당순이익 3.11달러를 기록했고, 매출총이익률·영업이익률·비GAAP EPS가 모두 기록을 경신했다.
데이터센터 수요 견조와 HAMR 기반 모자이크(Mozaic) 제품 램프가 분기 성과를 뒷받침했다.

businessChanges.text: 분기 중 만기 2028년 교환사채 5억 달러를 상환하고 배당으로 1억 5,400만 달러를 지급했다.
회사는 AI 확산으로 엑사바이트 규모의 성능·비용 효율 스토리지 수요가 늘 것으로 보고 면적밀도 중심 로드맵에 주력하고 있다고 밝혔다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출 28억 3,000만 달러, GAAP 매출총이익률 41.6%, 비GAAP 매출총이익률 42.2%를 기록했다.
GAAP 영업이익률 29.8%, 비GAAP 영업이익률 31.9%로 전년 대비 상승했다.
영업활동 현금흐름 7억 2,300만 달러, 잉여현금흐름 6억 700만 달러를 창출했다.

watchItems.text: 데이터센터·AI發 스토리지 수요와 HAMR 모자이크 제품 램프가 이어질지 지켜볼 필요가 있다.
주당 0.74달러 분기 배당 등 자본환원의 지속 여력을 확인할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 stxq22026pressreleasefinan.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Investor Relations Contact: Shanye Hudson, (510) 661-1600 shanye.hudson@seagate.com Media Contact: Karin Taylor, (408) 772-8279 karin.h.taylor@seagate.com SEAGATE TECHNOLOGY REPORTS FISCAL SECOND QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS Fiscal Q2 2026 Highlights ▪ Revenue of $2.83 billion ▪ GAAP gross margin of 41.6%; non-GAAP gross margin of 42.2% ▪ GAAP diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $2.60; non-GAAP diluted EPS of $3.11 ▪ Cash flow from operations of $723 million and free cash flow of $607 million ▪ Declared cash dividend of $0.74 per share Singapore – January 28, 2026 - Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX) (the “Company” or “Seagate”), a leading innovator of mass-capacity data storage, today reported fina  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.83 billion = 28억 3,000만 달러; $723 million = 7억 2,300만 달러; $607 million = 6억 700만 달러; $2.83 = 2.83달러; $2.60 = 2.60달러; $3.11 = 3.11달러; $723 = 723달러; $607 = 607달러; $0.74 = 0.74달러.

ded our expectations on both the top and bottom line, setting new records for gross margin, operating margin, and non-GAAP EPS. This performance highlights our team’s strong operational execution, the durability of data center demand, and the ongoing ramp of our HAMR-based Mozaic products,” said Dave Mosley, Seagate’s chair and chief executive officer. “As AI applications amplify the creation and economic value of data, modern data centers increasingly need storage solutions that combine performance and cost-efficiency at exabyte-scale. Our areal-density-driven product roadmap positions us to meet the evolving storage requirements and exabyte demand growth, while creating significant value for our customers and shareholders for years to come,” Mosley concluded. Quarterly Financial Results GAAP Non-GAAP FQ2 2026 FQ2 2025 FQ2 2026 FQ2 2025 Revenue ($M) $ 2,825 $   Normalized numeric aliases: $2,825 = 2,825달러; $2,325 = 2,325달러; 2,825 million = 28억 2,500만 달러; 2,325 million = 23억 2,500만 달러.

Margin 41.6 % 34.9 % 42.2 % 35.5 % Operating Margin 29.8 % 21.0 % 31.9 % 23.1 % Net Income ($M) $ 593 $ 336 $ 702 $ 433 Diluted Earnings Per Share $ 2.60 $ 1.55 $ 3.11 $ 2.03 For definitions and a detailed reconciliation of GAAP to non-GAAP results, see accompanying financial tables. During the fiscal second quarter, the Company generated $723 million in cash flow from operations and $607 million in free cash flow. Seagate’s balance sheet remains healthy, and during the fiscal second quarter, the Company retired $500 million Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2028 and paid cash dividends of $154 million. As of the end of the quarter, cash and cash equivalents totaled $1.0 billion,   Normalized numeric aliases: $723 million = 7억 2,300만 달러; $607 million = 6억 700만 달러; $500 million = 5억 달러; $154 million = 1억 5,400만 달러; $1.0 billion = 10억 달러; 218 million = 2억 1,800만 달러; $593 = 593달러; $336 = 336달러; $433 = 433달러; $723 = 723달러; $2.03 = 2.03달러; $607 = 607달러; $500 = 500달러; $154 = 154달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러.
